label: B cell
evidence: The label 'B cell' is used by the authors in the main text (Gopee et al., 2024, doi:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x) and supplementary material. The paper states: 'B cells and T cells emerged later, accompanying thymus, bone marrow and spleen formation from around 10 PCW'. B cells are annotated as a fine-grained cell state within the fetal scope of the atlas.
